73 E1N E1N_REPEAT_MOVES 21n(E1n)Repetitive Physical Movements CHAR 1 Indicates the frequency of the patient's repetitive physical movements. Examples include: pacing, hand wringing, restlessness, fidgeting, picking. -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space, 0 = Indicator not exhitied in last 30 days, 1 = Indicator of this type exhibited up to five
